description_long: This is a high-top Adidas sneaker featuring a dark gray and black upper with orange accents. The shoe has a padded collar and tongue for comfort, with the Adidas trefoil logo prominently displayed on the tongue and heel in orange and white. The side panels are detailed with stitched stripes and the Adidas name in yellow, while the midsole is white with an orange outsole. The lacing system uses black eyelets and standard criss-cross laces. The shoe shows some signs of wear, particularly on the white midsole, indicating it has been used but remains structurally intact.
description: A high-top Adidas sneaker in dark gray and black with orange accents, visible logos, and a white midsole. The shoe features a padded collar, stitched stripes, and standard lacing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Adidas trefoil logo on the tongue, black laces, and the rounded toe cap.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the stitched stripes, black upper, and orange heel accent.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large orange and white Adidas trefoil logo on the heel and the orange outsole.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the Adidas name and trefoil logo in yellow, with visible wear on the white midsole.
attribute_logo: Adidas trefoil logo on tongue (orange/white) and heel (orange/white), Adidas name and trefoil on right side (yellow)
